_comment: Merge the `crons` array into your existing vercel.json (create one at the repo root if you don't have it). Schedules are UTC: 07:00 UTC ≈ 2–3am Eastern; payroll-draft runs daily at 08:00 UTC and each tenant's cadence settings decide whether a draft is actually due. Also add a CRON_SECRET env var in Vercel — cron requests carry it automatically as a Bearer token.
